file.content:
[
  {
    "name": "heartbeat",
    "schedule": "*/30 * * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Read the file at config/HEARTBEAT.md and complete the tasks described there.",
    "llm_provider": "google",
    "llm_model": "gemini-2.0-flash",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "daily-check",
    "schedule": "0 9 * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Check for dependency updates in package.json and report any outdated packages.",
    "llm_provider": "custom",
    "llm_model": "deepseek-chat",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "ping",
    "schedule": "*/1 * * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "echo \"pong!\"",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cleanup-logs",
    "schedule": "0 0 * * 0",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "ls -la logs/",
    "enabled": false
  }
]

content.content: The file /job/config/CRONS.json has been updated successfully.

tool_use_result.originalFile:
[
  {
    "name": "heartbeat",
    "schedule": "*/30 * * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Read the file at config/HEARTBEAT.md and complete the tasks described there.",
    "llm_provider": "google",
    "llm_model": "gemini-2.0-flash",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "daily-check",
    "schedule": "0 9 * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Check for dependency updates in package.json and report any outdated packages.",
    "llm_provider": "custom",
    "llm_model": "deepseek-chat",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "ping",
    "schedule": "*/1 * * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "echo \"pong!\"",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cleanup-logs",
    "schedule": "0 0 * * 0",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "ls -la logs/",
    "enabled": false
  }
]
